final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [4:0] out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        out <= 5'b00001;
    end else begin
        out <= {out[3:0], out[4]};
    end
end

endmodule
